specific_question: How many thermal management system defects were identified per 100 vehicles during Elexion Automotive quality audits in the fourth quarter of 2024?
answer: During Q4 2024 quality audits, Elexion Automotive identified an average of 5.7 thermal management system defects per 100 vehicles, involving coolant irregularities and temperature sensor calibration issues that required corrective actions before delivery.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
